classification_rationale: Hard progress-gated rows retained diagnostic influence but all remained horizon_exhausted.
command: LOGURU_LEVEL=WARNING TF_CPP_MIN_LOG_LEVEL=2 PYGAME_HIDE_SUPPORT_PROMPT=1 DISPLAY= MPLBACKEND=Agg SDL_VIDEODRIVER=dummy uv run python scripts/validation/run_topology_reselection_cross_slice.py --output-dir <local-diagnostic-output-dir>
interpretation: Progress-gated reselection generalizes as an activation/diagnostic mechanism across the selected non-canonical hard slices, but it did not clear any hard slice at h160. Treat as revise/successor-needed, not promotion evidence.
